page: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv6 family, powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 2 vCPUs mapped to 1 physical core utilizing hyper-threading. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz and includes a 260 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, and includes 118 GB of local storage. The instance is also Premium Storage capable but does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks reveal strong single-core capabilities, as evidenced by a Geekbench single-core score of 2105.0 and a strong single-threaded gzip compression rate of 31.2 GB/sec. However, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are more constrained. The stress-ng multi-core performance is rated as poor, and uncached memory read and write bandwidths are limited to 20.87 GB/sec and 13.93 GB/sec respectively. This indicates a clear tradeoff: while single-threaded execution is highly responsive due to the 4.2 GHz clock speed and advanced instruction support, parallelized workloads and memory-intensive operations are restricted by the dual-vCPU configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents an entry-level general-purpose tier. It provides dedicated CPU resources and local SSD storage without the overhead of high-core counts, making it a resource-dense option for lightweight workloads. It is well-suited for basic web serving, single-threaded text processing, light database operations, and small-scale development tasks that benefit from high single-core clock speeds but do not require massive parallel processing or high memory throughput.
description: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with an Intel Xeon 8573C processor offering 2 vCPUs (1 physical core with hyper-threading) clocked at 4.2 GHz, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 118 GB of local storage. While it lacks GPU acceleration and public IPv4 addresses, it supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show strong single-core performance, highlighted by a Geekbench single-core score of 2105.0 and fast single-threaded gzip compression. However, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are relatively weak due to the 2-vCPU limit. This server is qualitatively cost-effective for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, such as basic web serving, text processing, and small-scale development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8573C processor, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 118 GB of local storage, optimized for single-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 118 GB local storage, offering strong single-core performance.
tagline: A dual-vCPU general-purpose instance featuring high single-core clock speeds, integrated local storage, and advanced Intel instruction sets for lightweight workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 2 vCPUs and 4.2 GHz clock speed
8.0 GB of system memory and 118 GB of local SSD storage
Strong single-core performance with advanced AVX-512 and AMX support
Constrained multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities
Suitable for basic web serving, text processing, and light development
